description_long: This is a pair of large, metal scissors with a visibly aged and weathered appearance, featuring dark, mottled surfaces and some reddish discoloration suggestive of rust or staining. The blades are long, straight, and sharply pointed, designed for precise cutting, and they show signs of wear along the edges. The handles are circular and symmetrical, each forming a loop large enough to accommodate fingers comfortably, with no visible padding or ergonomic shaping. The two blades are joined at a central pivot point by a prominent, round rivet, which is slightly raised and metallic in finish. The overall construction appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty cutting tasks in urban or industrial settings. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, emphasizing a purely functional design.
description: A large, weathered pair of metal scissors with long, pointed blades and symmetrical circular handles, joined by a central rivet. The surface is dark and mottled, showing signs of rust and heavy use.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blades and the central rivet, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: A side view displaying both long, pointed blades open wide, the circular handles, and the dark, mottled surface with reddish discoloration.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view from the opposite side, again highlighting the thinness of the blades and the central pivot.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view similar to view 1, showing the open blades, circular handles, and weathered metal surface.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, circular metal loops; not ergonomic or padded; ambidextrous design with no special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Fixed rivet joint; visible and non-adjustable; standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized, round loops; smooth metal with no inserts or texturing; accommodates one or two fingers per loop.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Sharply pointed tips; designed for precision cutting; not rounded or blunted.
